_comment: Reference seed-users for the no-sponsor local-stack (read by portal_server_evs via PORTAL_SEED_USERS_PATH; parsed by seed_config.dart). Applied idempotently on boot. Under the local-stack's PORTAL_AUTH_MODE=dev, userId is the dev-credential login id typed verbatim (no password). One SystemOperator is enough to drive the operator UI run-through from core alone; provision further roles through the portal.
